user.title: Geo Weather Alarms Setup
user.description:
To use this integration, you need a free API key from the European Weather Data Portal.

1. Go to [devportal.meteogate.eu](https://devportal.meteogate.eu/)
2. Register an account and create a new Application.
3. Copy your **API Key** and paste it below.

Your location will be determined automatically based on your Home Assistant settings.

abort.already_configured: Geo Weather Alarms is already configured.
